snippet.title: MACV-SOG Huey Crew Chief and Door Gunner | Roger Lockshier | Ep. 204
snippet.description:
Roger Lockshier enlisted in the US Army in April 1966. After completing Airborne (Paratrooper) Jump Training at Fort Benning GA, he was assigned to Aviation Battalion 101st Airborne Division, Fort Campbell Kentucky, December 1966.

In December of 1967 the 101st Airborne Division was transferred to Viet Nam. Lockshier was a Crewchief / Doorgunner with the 101st Airborne's Black Angels Huey Helicopter Gunships assigned to provide combat support to the 101st Airborne and 5th Special Forces MACVSOG. He returned to the States in December of 1968.

Lockshier was the recipient of several awards:

• Two time recipient of The Distinguished Flying Cross

• Bronze Star

• Purple Heart

• Air Medal with "V" Device

• 19 Air Medals

• Army Commendation Medal

• Army Presidential Unit Citation 101st Airborne

• Army Presidential Unit Citation Special Forces Khe Sahn

• Army Presidential Unit Citation MACVSOG (Special Ops)

• Navy Presidential Unit Citation Khe Sahn

Lockshier lives in Oxford CT with Barbara his wife of 52 years. He and his wife have two sons, Roger, Jr. and his wife Allison living in North Carolina with their four children Andrew, Lucas, Sophie, & Jude, and Jeff and his wife Jennifer living in Oxford CT with their two children Dylan, and Samantha.

You can contact Roger at rflockshier@gmail.com

Grab his book here:⬇️
https://www.amazon.com/We-Saved-SOG-Souls-Airborne/dp/B09NRC4ZB4

snippet.title: Steelhead Fishing Tips - "Presentation Matters" from Jack Barr at FishUSA's Chrome Fest 2023
snippet.description:
Proper presentation is very important in all types of fishing, but it is especially crucial when talking steelhead fishing. 
Jack Barr, a fly fishing guide based out of NW Pennsylvania, discusses why presentation is so important in steelhead fishing and provides tips as to how you can improve.
This video was filmed at FishUSA's Chrome Fest, an event that allowed steelhead anglers to gather and listen to presentations, eat and drink for free, and take advantage of sales & deals on their favorite steelhead fishing tackle! 
You can get a hold of Jack to book a trip at JackB.RTB@outlook.com or check him out at www.rtbguideservice.com

Steelhead can be quite particular fish, but they'll take anything from egg patterns to swung flies when presented correctly. The challenge of cathing these trophy fish draws steelhead anglers from all over to the Great Lakes. The steelhead's beautiful color patterns and markings are backed by an incredible fight, especially when hooked on a fly rod. Even Winter steelhead can put up an incredible battle in the frigid cold months. It's important to have the right fly line for your presentation. In most cases, floating line will do the trick. However, if you like swinging flies you may need sinking lines. Shop FishUSA's fly store to find everything you'll need: https://www.fishusa.com/fly-shop/

snippet.title: Tracy Shuchart Talks Europe, Energy Crisis, Manufacturing Sector, Coal, Nuclear Energy (RCS 265)
snippet.description:
Interview original date: October 3rd, 2022

Topics- What will Europe face into the winter months with their energy crisis? Europe is at 70% gas storage, but the forecast is not good, they are preparing for rolling blackouts. We were seeing these problems in Germany even before the invasion of Ukraine. In the energy industry we will see more problems. The European manufacturing sector announced that if they need to cut natural gas consumption this winter, they will cut the commercial sector first, before retail consumers. This means they are talking about input to so many of the goods they produce. It's not just about heating. It's especially about the chemical industry. Contagion effect. The chemical industry will affect the steel industry. The steel industry affects the car manufacturing industry and this is one of the biggest industries in Germany. The companies will switch from gas to oil. Coal industry is also huge right now, even if they wanted to shut down their last three nuclear plants, their consumption has gone up, it doesn't make sense. We will probably see a turnaround in Europe's mindset on nuclear energy and in the use of uranium. 
A lot of pain needs to be absorbed by the general public before the politicians change their minds and their goals. What will we see happening with the price of oil and energy? We will have a shortfall, demand will most likely rise. OPEC doesn't have much spare capacity left with a 2.75 million production deficit. Going into 2023, we will see another bounce in oil. The Government is demonizing the US producers of oil, now they don't have an incentive to produce. Who wants to invest capital like that?

SUBSCRIBE to More George Gammon: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCcbQw4-3c-HEKlJmpSZoQUQ

snippet.title: Globe Life LN | AO Meeting Highlights
snippet.description:
Agency owners from Globe Life Liberty National enjoyed getting together in Puerto Vallarta for a week's worth of inspirational meetings, unforgettable activities, and amazing food. The annual AO meeting is an opportunity to pour energy into the importance of strong leadership and team development, all with the goal of making tomorrow better. Liberty National partnered with Entreamigos, a non-profit organization that supports the community of San Pancho, to raise over $23,000. #GlobeLifeLifestyle

Learn more about Liberty National by clicking the link below. 
https://careers.globelifeinsurance.com/libertynational?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=agentrecruiting
